meaning: 领航的职业,(船)近岸航行法,[空]地标领航
examples: Teachers are piloting a literature-based reading programme.
This means piloting stints of some four to five days at a time.
They are currently in the process of piloting two programs aimed at getting families outdoors.
We tried driving the walks, madly piloting our rented car along mule tracks and logging trails.
The Additive Manufacturing institute is piloting many of the ideas developed for the NNMI.
